title: Senior Accountant (SGX, Consolidation)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Prepare monthly consolidation packages and consolidated financial statements in compliance with SFRS/IFRS.
  • Draft statutory financial statements along with necessary notes and disclosures, ensuring adherence to SFRS/IFRS standards.
  • Review and analyze management accounts from various corporate and regional subsidiaries.
  • Ensure the delivery of accurate, high-quality financial reporting for internal and external stakeholders.
  • Support half-year and year-end audit processes, liaising with external auditors to address any queries.
  • Collaborate with department heads on annual budgeting and monthly rolling forecasts for the group.
  • Perform variance analysis and provide actionable insights based on consolidated data.
  • Assist in preparing cash flow projections and financial planning.
  • Develop and improve consolidation policies, procedures, and templates.
  • Support automation initiatives to streamline reporting processes and enhance internal controls.
  • Work closely with regional finance teams to ensure accurate and compliant reporting.
  • Provide guidance and support to Finance/Accounts Executives.
  • Participate in ad hoc projects and cross-functional initiatives as needed.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Accounting with a preferred ACCA or CA qualification.
  • 3 to 5 years of relevant experience in group consolidation and financial reporting; hands-on experience is essential.
  • Prior audit experience is necessary; experience at a Big4 accounting firm is advantageous.
  • Comprehensive knowledge of Singapore Financial Reporting Standards (SFRS) and IFRS.
  • Strong analytical skills with a keen attention to detail.
  • Proficient in MS Office applications with the capability to work both independently and collaboratively.


Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click on “Apply”. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

EA License No.: 01C4394 (PERSOL SINGAPORE PTE LTD)

You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
